title: digitaria simpsonii
intro: Digitaria simpsonii, also known as finger grass or Digitaria grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria simpsonii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, or used in the form of infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
